full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Convert LLM disclosures to required Part B JSON format.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Reformat all llm_task JSON files to match Part A schema plus required fields task_tag, code_used_verbatim, and student_modification per interaction.
full_llm_interaction_log.response_summary: Generated a consistent schema and task-wise interaction logs for all ten files.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Standardized all disclosure files to guideline format.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: Reviewed and edited prompt text and verification statements task-by-task for accuracy.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I manually reviewed each JSON file for schema consistency and task relevance.
full_llm_interaction_log.why_important: Task 4.2 marks depend on correct JSON structure across all files.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Validate top_5 prompts constraint per task.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Ensure top_5_prompts in each file are drawn only from interactions in that same file, with all included when fewer than five.
full_llm_interaction_log.response_summary: Applied task-specific top prompt lists and capped to available interactions.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Ensured compliance with top_5 prompt requirement.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I spot-checked prompt IDs against each interaction log.
full_llm_interaction_log.why_important: This is explicitly stated in the guideline and affects file validity.

top_5_prompts.prompt: Reformat all llm_task JSON files to match Part A schema plus required fields task_tag, code_used_verbatim, and student_modification per interaction.
top_5_prompts.why_important: Task 4.2 marks depend on correct JSON structure across all files.

top_5_prompts.prompt: Ensure top_5_prompts in each file are drawn only from interactions in that same file, with all included when fewer than five.
top_5_prompts.why_important: This is explicitly stated in the guideline and affects file validity.

student_verification: I verified that each logged interaction is task-relevant and that any copied code was reviewed and tested before inclusion.

student_declaration.statement: I declare that this file is an honest and complete disclosure of LLM usage for the stated task. Final decisions, interpretations, and conclusions are my own.
